accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.

accommodations.text: Do not grade spelling on first-draft written work.
accommodations.source_quote: Do not grade spelling on first-draft written work.

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a word bank for written-response items.

accommodations.text: Provide a copy of teacher notes.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a copy of teacher notes.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy: 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Speech-language pathologist.

services.provider_role: Teacher of the deaf and hard of hearing
services.source_quote: Deaf/hard-of-hearing itinerant support: 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Teacher of the deaf and hard of hearing.
Specialized academic instruction (reading): 150 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 5 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.

goals.text: Jamal will answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: Jamal will answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy.

goals.text: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Reviews work before submitting in 1 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Sofia will produce /r/ in the initial position of words with 80% accuracy in structured tasks.
goals.target: 80% accuracy in structured tasks across three sessions.
goals.source_quote: Sofia will produce /r/ in the initial position of words with 80% accuracy in structured tasks.

goals.text: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
goals.source_quote: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
